_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in conducting reviews of technical systems.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned, and accessible to a non-technical business audience.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-S-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-S-011 (TF, cosine: 0.528), LS-S-005 (LS, cosine: 0.524).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.9/10 (raw 0.486). Shared vocabulary: [skill, technical]. DCWF-only terms [conducting, reviews, systems] vs WIDAI-only terms [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.894 (P=0.925, R=0.866). P exceeds R by 0.058 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (98.9%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Skill in conducting reviews of technical systems." and "Skill in producing analysis documentation that is reproducible, clearly reasoned". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.579 > STS 0.486 (gap +0.093). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [skill, technical] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [skill, technical]. DCWF-only: [conducting, reviews, systems]. WIDAI-only: [accessible, analysis, audience, business, clearly, documentation].
